title: Grilled Castelvetrano Chicken with Olive Salsa
description: A flavorful and refreshing dish combining the sweetness of Castelvetrano olives with the char of grilled chicken. Perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and peppercorns.
3. Brush the mixture onto both sides of the chicken breasts.
4. Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through to an internal temperature of 165°F.
5. Meanwhile, combine Castelvetrano olives, parsley, and a pinch of salt in a bowl.
6. Serve the grilled chicken with the olive salsa spooned on top.
7. Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
